mapper.insert: INSERT INTO day_entry (user_id, entry_date, comment) VALUES (#{userId}, #{entryDate}, #{comment})
mapper.select: SELECT de.entry_date AS date, MAX(di.thumb_url) AS thumbUrl, MAX(di.fit) AS fit, (de.comment IS NOT NULL AND de.comment <> '') AS hasComment, COUNT(t.id) AS todoTotal, COALESCE(SUM(t.is_done), 0) AS todoDone FROM day_entry de LEFT JOIN day_image di ON di.day_entry_id = de.id AND di.sort_order = 0 LEFT JOIN todo t ON t.day_entry_id = de.id WHERE de.user_id = #{userId} AND de.entry_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY de.id ORDER BY de.entry_date
